title: I'll Be a Dependable Big Sis!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking with Matikanetannhauser when an
unexpected voice reaches our ears.
Hrm... A rookie blunder!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huh? That voice... Is that...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Director! It is you! What are you doing all alone in a place like this?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I have a rare day to myself today... so I thought
I'd come to this amusement park. However...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Disappointment! It completely slipped my mind
how many rides require a guardian to accompany
you!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
I had such sky-high expectations for today, so to
be forced to withdraw empty-handed is simply...
devastating!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Mun-mun... Trainer! This is a job for the support
squad!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Please rest assured, Director! You have two
capable guardians right here!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
What's this?! Are you saying that you'll
accompany me?!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Many thanks! I shall happily take you up on your
kind offer! Now, sally forth! Fun rides await!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, what unfettered emotion! To think the
spectacle I've dreamed of is now before my very
eyes!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Let's not just stand around! First up is the de
rigueur attraction! Onward to the roller coaster!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe. Seeing her like this, the director seems
like any ordinary child, doesn't she?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
She reminds me of my brother when he was little...
Hm.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I've come to a decision! I'm going to be the
director's big sister for today!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
She always does so much for all of us! So Big Sis
Machitan is going to look after her and make sure
she has a ton of fun!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
No problem! I've been a big sis since the day my
lil' bro was born—I'm a pro!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Director! What ride do you want to go on
next?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Let's see! We've done several of the tamer ones,
like the Ferris wheel and spinning teacups. Next,
I'd like to take on the drop tower!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Got it! Big S—I'll lead the way! I'm pretty sure we want to turn left here...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Objection! According to that map over there, we
need to take the path to the right.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh? ...Ah, looks like you're right.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! Look over there! They have special carrot
ice cream! I bet you'd like to try some, wouldn't
you, Director?!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... Intriguing! I've no choice but to partake!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, I know, right?! Okay then, I'll go buy you
one!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Ack. Gyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
She tripped over! ...A nosebleed?! Quick! Use
these tissues!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Ah, blissful satisfaction! Thanks to the two of you,
I had a truly splendid day off!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
By the way, Tannhauser, you were very bright and
energetic indeed! You made this experience a lot
of fun!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... Oh, it was nothing.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
However... I have one small concern! Be sure to
take care of yourself and lead a healthy academic
life!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Then, I bid you adieu. I'll never forget the
memories we created here today! Farewell!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Hang on a second! She's worried about me?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
H-how can that be?! I thought I was supposed to
be her dependable big sis today!
choice_data_list: I think you made a fine big sister.
I think you made a fine big sister.
It was kind of the opposite...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Of course! There's no way someone with
over a decade of big sis experience like me could
fail. No way... Ahaha.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: W-well, which is it?! Geez!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser is still a ways off from
becoming a dependable big sister. ...But she
makes a pretty good ditzy big sister.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Huuuh?! No way! My pride as an actual big sis is
crumbling to dust!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you're right! And that's the most important
thing!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I had lots of fun too. I hope the three of us get
another chance to hang out like that someday.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
And that'll be my chance to really show what a
dependable big sis I am!
